title: Video: This terrifying, AI-designed robot will never stop chasing you
summary: The ‘legged metamachines’ that absolutely will not stop need to be seen to be believed.

title: Se robotarna som vägrar ge upp
summary: A science feature on AI-designed modular robots that keep moving despite severe damage and adapt to unexpected outdoor conditions.
cover_image_alt: An AI-designed modular robot moving with Lake Michigan and the Chicago skyline in the background.
